elements.name: Create New Contract on a Unit Property with Single Owner

steps.name: I reset contract status for certificate "18327" year "2019"
I open the DLD login page
I select "Username" login option
I enter username "majed.1015"
I enter password "654321"
I click on "Login"
I should see logged-in username as "MAJED AHMAD MAJED SAIF ALMHEIRI"
I land on the dashboard
I click on "Contracts" tab
I close the popup message
I click on "Create Contract A" in the left panel
I should see owner selection options
I select "Owner Person" option
I should see property validation form
I enter Certificate Number "18327"
I select Certificate Year "2019"
I select Property Type "Unit"
I select Owner Verification Type "Passport"
I select "Passport" from the list
I should see passport field displayed
I enter Passport "382239911"
I click on "Save & Close" button
I should see "Property Information" details screen
I select "Residential" from Usage dropdown

result.error_message:

steps.name: I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see "Owner Details" details screen
I select "Yes" for Green List question
I click on the checkbox
I click on "I Confirm" button
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see "Tenancy Information" details screen
I click on tenancy confirmation checkbox
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see "Property Financial Information" details screen
I enter Sell Price "100000"
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see "Commission and Duration" details screen
I select Contract Start date 2 days from today
I select Contract End date 3 months from start date
I select Commission as paid and enter amount "20000"
I select NOC from developer as Yes
I select Seller covering marketing fee as Yes
I select Is Exclusive as No
I click on "Save & Close" button
I enter notes for testing
I click on "Save and Continue" button
I should see preview page with terms and conditions
I click on terms and conditions checkbox
I click on Submit Contract for Approval button
I should see success message Your contract has been submitted successfully
